mapper.select: SELECT puzzle_id FROM daily_puzzle_schedule WHERE puzzle_date = #{puzzleDate} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO daily_puzzle_schedule (puzzle_date, puzzle_id) VALUES (#{puzzleDate}, #{puzzleId})
INSERT INTO daily_puzzle_schedule (puzzle_date, puzzle_id) VALUES (#{puzzleDate}, #{puzzleId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE puzzle_id = VALUES(puzzle_id)
